name: Deferred - Bad Reputation - 2
description: Second returns for lingering suspicion and bad reputation.

results.description: [social -1] The old reputation from {origin} cost you standing when it mattered most.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] Suspicion from {origin} settled on you again so naturally that others treated it as prudence.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [social 1] The old stain from {origin} was answered so well that some people came to respect you more for having borne it.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [money -30] Bad repute from {origin} did not close every door, but it made entry dearer.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] What others had long suspected from {origin} lost force once you endured it without flinching or apology.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [social -1] The old reputation from {origin} proved impossible to disprove and too useful to your detractors to ignore.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [money -20] Suspicion from {origin} cost you work, trust, or fair terms, which amounts to coin in the end.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [social 1] The very rumor from {origin} that once burdened you later made your survival look impressive.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] Your old name from {origin} remained troubled enough that some opportunities quietly chose easier candidates.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [social -1] What began as suspicion in {origin} hardened into a reputation no simple truth could wash away.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The old stain from {origin} lost its power when fresher events made it look smaller than it had once seemed.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [social 1] The suspicion born in {origin} was finally answered in a way others could not easily deny.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [money -40] Your old reputation from {origin} forced one payment, concession, or retreat too humiliating to forget quickly.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] The rumor from {origin} never fully died; it merely learned to speak more softly and persistently.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [social 1] The old reputation from {origin} became almost a legend, and legends are kinder than gossip when distance has done its work.
results.name: reputation-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] Suspicion from {origin} faded into something like character: still remembered, no longer decisive.
results.name: reputation-2
